description.zh: QueryEngine 的核心循环：用户输入 → API 调用 → 工具执行 → 结果回传，直到模型说 stop
description.en: QueryEngine core loop: user input → API call → tool execution → result return, until model says stop

content.zh: 帮我修复 auth.ts 中的登录 bug
content.en: Help me fix the login bug in auth.ts

annotation.zh: 用户输入请求，消息加入 messages[]
annotation.en: User input request, message added to messages[]

content.zh:
QueryEngine.run():
  构建 system prompt (动态组装)
  检查 token 预算 (200K 上限)
  → 发送 API 请求
content.en:
QueryEngine.run():
  Build system prompt (dynamic assembly)
  Check token budget (200K limit)
  → Send API request

annotation.zh: QueryEngine 准备上下文，动态裁剪确保不超预算
annotation.en: QueryEngine prepares context, dynamic trimming ensures budget compliance

content.zh: 让我先看一下 auth.ts 的内容...
content.en: Let me first check the contents of auth.ts...

annotation.zh: 模型回复文本，stop_reason = 'tool_use'，循环继续
annotation.en: Model reply text, stop_reason = 'tool_use', loop continues

annotation.zh: 模型发起工具调用：读取文件
annotation.en: Model initiates tool call: read file

content.zh:
权限检查:
  FileRead → src/auth.ts
  ✓ 在工作区内
  ✓ 无敏感文件匹配
  → 执行工具
content.en:
Permission check:
  FileRead → src/auth.ts
  ✓ Within workspace
  ✓ No sensitive file match
  → Execute tool

annotation.zh: 每个工具调用都经过权限引擎检查
annotation.en: Every tool call goes through permission engine check

annotation.zh: 工具结果追加到 messages[]，循环回到 API 调用
annotation.en: Tool result appended to messages[], loop back to API call

annotation.zh: 模型决定编辑文件修复 bug
annotation.en: Model decides to edit file to fix bug

content.zh:
✓ 文件已更新: src/auth.ts
  - 替换了 1 处匹配
已修复！问题是密码使用了明文比较，现已改为 bcrypt.compare() 安全比对。
content.en: Fixed! The issue was plaintext password comparison, now changed to secure bcrypt.compare().

annotation.zh: stop_reason = 'end_turn'，循环退出，响应返回给用户
annotation.en: stop_reason = 'end_turn', loop exits, response returned to user
